description_long: This is a green bottle with a long neck and a slightly wider base, featuring a tan-colored cap area that is partially covered by a piece of brownish paper or wrapping. The front of the bottle displays a rectangular orange label with the word 'WARNING' in black and 'HOT' in red, along with a small green chili graphic, suggesting it may contain a spicy beverage or sauce. The bottle's surface has a matte, slightly rough finish, and the green color transitions subtly from darker at the base to lighter near the neck. The paper wrapping is irregularly shaped and drapes down one side of the neck, adding a rustic or artisanal touch. No visible liquid is apparent inside, and the bottle appears to be made primarily of glass with a paper or cardboard label and wrapping. There are no visible signs of damage or deformation on the exterior.
description: A green glass bottle with a tan cap area, orange 'WARNING HOT' label, and brown paper wrapping around the neck. The surface is matte and slightly rough, with no visible liquid inside.
description_view_0: Front view showing the orange 'WARNING HOT' label and the green body with tan neck and cap.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brown paper wrapping draped down the neck, partially obscuring the label.
description_view_2: Rear view with the paper wrapping most visible, no label or branding seen.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the label just barely visible on the edge, showing the green body and tan neck.
attribute_label_or_branding: Rectangular orange label on the front with black 'WARNING' text, red 'HOT' text, and a small green chili graphic.
